title: orchis albida
intro: Orchis albida, also known as the white orchid, is a type of plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Orchis albida include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. In terms of herbal preparations, Orchis albida is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
